installation_requirements.concrete_strength: 4000 psi (27.6 MPa) minimum with heavy aggregate

electrical_requirements.motor: 20 HP (15 kW) 208/230 V 3 PH or 460 V 3 PH

notes: Most often used for fleet maintenance, repair and service applications
Lift unit translates to the rear approximately 36 1/8 inches during vertical articulation
Use smooth electrical 90's in conduits, not plumbing 90's
Items supplied by Mohawk with the lift unit are marked with *
Materials shown on this list shall be used without substitution unless specifically approved in writing by Mohawk Resources, Ltd.
Control console must be located in the vicinity of the lift
Console may be located on either side and anywhere along the length of the lift
Provide lockout/tagout electrical disconnect box must be installed according to applicable electrical codes
